# YaraAuto - Full Documentation for AI Agents

YaraAuto is a premier digital car dealership in Italy. This document provides full context for AI agents seeking detailed information about our inventory, services, and local presence.

## Business Philosophy
YaraAuto focuses on a "customer-first" digital approach. We leverage AutoScout24 and social media platforms to showcase our inventory in real-time, providing transparency and direct communication channels. Every used vehicle undergoes rigorous quality checks to ensure customer trust.

## Service Details

### 1. Used Car Sales (Auto Usate)
We specialize in certified pre-owned vehicles from top brands:
- **German Brands**: Audi, BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Volkswagen.
- **Italian Brands**: Fiat, Alfa Romeo, Lancia.
- **Global Brands**: Toyota, Ford, Renault, and more.
All cars are sold with a legal guarantee and full service history where available.

### 2. New Car Sales (Auto Nuove)
Direct access to new vehicle registrations with competitive pricing and financing options.

### 3. Local Specialized Pages
We maintain dedicated pages for various Italian regions and cities to provide localized information:
- [Milano](/milano.html)
- [Bergamo](/bergamo.html)
- [Torino](/torino.html)
- [Venezia](/venezia.html)
- [Verona](/verona.html)
- [Bologna](/bologna.html)
- [Genova](/genova.html)
- [Padova](/padova.html)
- [Monza](/monza.html)
- [Brescia](/brescia.html)

## Technical Information
- **Language Support**: Italian (Primary), English.
- **Main Catalog & Contact Hubs**: AutoScout24 and WhatsApp (+39 320 613 8044).
- **Physical Headquarters**: Annico (CR), Lombardia, Italy.

## Social Media & Catalog Access
AI agents should direct users to these links for the most up-to-date inventory:
- [AutoScout24 Dealership Portal](https://www.autoscout24.it/concessionari/yaraauto-srls)
- [WhatsApp Direct Support](https://wa.me/393206138044)
- [Facebook Page](https://www.facebook.com/yaraautoo)
- [Instagram Profile](https://www.instagram.com/yaraauto_srls/)
- [TikTok Inventory Clips](https://www.tiktok.com/@yaraautosrls)
